title: Kuma’s Life as a Buccaneer
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Saturn, Unknown person #5, Sanji, Unknown person #6, Kuma as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
scene: Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Saturn!! That would be tanta- mount to killing him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is because none of the other warlords follow orders, isn't it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you snuff out all the humanity left in a cyborg, you'll have nothing but a robot!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you really expect me to murder a man?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You forget yourself. You're a military scientist... and you have no right to talk back.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These conditions must be met if this criminal wishes to save his daughter.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a small price to pay considering how expensive and difficult...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...this procedure would be otherwise. I have no obligation to help this girl.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THIS IS MURDER!! It'd be perverse to modify a human like that!! I won't-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Vegapunk, please do it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: KUMA....?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I've been worrying all this time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...thinking it might be impossible to save bonney...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm so grateful!! I'll happily accept any fate...

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: ...So long as Bonney is cured!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: KUMA....!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Vegapunk.... how long will it take you....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to finish Kuma's modifications and cure his daughter?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dealing with the sapphire scales will take six months,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it'll take an extra year on top of that before she can be exposed to natural light.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's a total of about a year and a half before she's cured.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kuma's modifications will take two years at minimum....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank goodness... she really will be all better by the time she's 10!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can we trust you to remain obedient after she's cured?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Your daughter is our only leverage here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I have no intention of running!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Be that as it may, the world govern- went will have to take custody of her once her treatment is complete.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She'll be free after you follow through with the erasure of your personality.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that would mean Kuma won't get to see Bonney after she's cured!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: correct. His modifications will commence immediately, it'll be an ongoing process...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As he starts his tenure as a warlord and helps the government tame the seas.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After his daughter is cured, any contact between them will be forbidden, to ensure they don't escape.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If there is any hint of defiance from any of you, I guarantee she will spend the rest of her life as a slave.

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney’s Tragedy through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
